title: Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced triumphs on Steam while Ubisoft Barcelona workers protest layoffs
summary: The game enjoys great sales success on Valve's platform, while the Spanish studio joins a three-day strike against the job cuts announced by the company.

title: Glen Schofield, co-creator of Dead Space and industry veteran, announces his retirement from video game development
summary: In an emotional video, the historic designer of games like Dead Space and Call of Duty says goodbye to daily work, highlighting the privilege of having witnessed a golden age of the industry.

title: Game Freak reveals the combat system of its anticipated action RPG, Beast of Reincarnation
summary: The creator of Pokémon has shown an extensive trailer focused on the game's combat mechanics, generating great expectation among fans of the genre.

title: Compulsion Games regains independence after separating from Xbox and seeks new alliances for South of Midnight
summary: The studio responsible for the narrative action game has confirmed that it is no longer part of Xbox Game Studios and is exploring external collaborations to continue its project.

title: The PlayStation ports of Call of Duty: Black Ops and Black Ops 2 suffer a massive hacker invasion
summary: The anticipated return of Activision classics to modern platforms has been marred by the uncontrolled presence of cheaters, generating enormous frustration among players.

title: Industry executives and veterans warn that consoles must innovate to survive in an uncertain future
summary: Former Sony executives express their desire for Xbox to regain competitiveness, while analysts warn of the risk of a market dominated by thousand-dollar consoles and a lack of innovation.

title: Dragon's Dogma 2: Dark Arisen adds new regions and infinite fast travel, although the director insists that its use is optional
summary: The anticipated expansion of Capcom's RPG introduces an eternal travel stone to facilitate exploration, but the developer clarifies that players are not forced to use it to enjoy the content.

title: The Meccha Chameleon clones on Roblox surpass the original Steam game in player count
summary: The phenomenon of unauthorized copies intensifies, as the original stealth game is surpassed by its imitations on the Roblox platform, highlighting a growing problem in the industry.

title: A developer with sexual harassment accusations is part of the team for the new Avatar Legends game
summary: Just one week before the launch of the fighting game inspired by the Nickelodeon series, the involvement of a professional previously flagged for inappropriate sexual conduct has been revealed.

title: Jurassic World Evolution 2: Complete Edition confirms its launch on Nintendo Switch 2 for the end of July
summary: The definitive version of the Jurassic park simulator, which includes all expansions and additional content, will arrive on Nintendo's new console on July 30.

title: Konami announces that the new Castlevania game, Belmont's Curse, will launch on Nintendo Switch in October
summary: The new installment of the legendary vampire hunter saga, developed by an external team under license from Konami, is scheduled to arrive on the hybrid console on October 15.

title: Numerous survival guides published for the 1.0 version of Palworld with key resource locations
summary: Ahead of the game's full launch, various media and content creators have produced comprehensive guides to help players find the best locations for their bases and the most coveted materials.

title: Magic: The Gathering announces Star Trek cards signed by the cast of the original series
summary: The new crossover collection between Wizards of the Coast and the science fiction franchise includes cards autographed by actors from the classic series, generating a great stir among collectors and fans.

title: Techland definitively cancels the launch of Dying Light: The Beast on last-generation consoles
summary: The Polish studio has confirmed that the game will not come to PlayStation 4 or Xbox One due to the power and memory limitations of these platforms, focusing its efforts on next-generation versions.

title: George Lucas defends artificial intelligence in cinema, comparing it to the adoption of the car versus the horse
summary: The legendary creator of Star Wars has endorsed the use of generative AI in the audiovisual industry, stating that opposing it is as backward a stance as rejecting technological progress.

title: Ubisoft shows concern over the consequences of its cuts while promising the return of its major franchises
summary: The French company acknowledges the impact of its internal and personnel decisions, but announces that this year will be one of transition to focus on new releases of Assassin's Creed, Far Cry, and Ghost Recon.

title: Disney confirms a panel dedicated to Kingdom Hearts at D23, where major announcements about its video games are expected
summary: The Mickey Mouse company has scheduled a presentation at its biannual event to show the upcoming titles in the Square Enix franchise and offer news about its video game strategy.

title: Actor Steve Buscemi joins the cast of the Far Cry television series on FX
summary: Known for his roles in films like 'Reservoir Dogs' and 'Boardwalk Empire', Buscemi embarks on the adaptation of Ubisoft's popular shooter video game, although his exact role has not yet been revealed.

title: The director of The Witcher 3 believes that a possible delay of the next generation of consoles would not be harmful
summary: Veteran designer Konrad Tomaszkiewicz opines that extending the lifecycle of current machines can give studios more time, benefiting the industry as a whole.

title: Nintendo studies the possibility of launching a Switch 2 with an OLED screen, although it is concerned about the impact on the price
summary: While the Japanese company evaluates an improved version of its new console, it also adjusts the price of the launch bundle in the United States with a discount to make purchasing the system more attractive.
